# Buzz

> Personal site of Buzz — the official mascot of the Georgia Institute of Technology.

## About

Buzz is a Yellow Jacket who has served as the official mascot of Georgia Tech since 1979. He can be found at football games doing push-ups after every score, riding atop the Ramblin' Wreck, and generally maintaining school spirit across campus.

## Current Work

- Official mascot duties at all Georgia Tech athletic events
- Campus ambassador for prospective students and alumni events
- Part-time crowd surfer and full-time hype man

## Selected Projects

- Ramblin' Wreck Restoration: annual maintenance of the 1930 Ford Model A
- Game Day Hype Analytics: crowd energy tracking across 24 home games
- Hive Redesign: mascot lounge and memorabilia refresh
- Fight Song Remix Archive: collection of every Ramblin' Wreck arrangement
- Campus Tour Guide Bot: automated tour guide for prospective students

## Links

- GitHub: https://github.com
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com
- Email: buzz@example.com

## Skills

Crowd engagement, push-ups, motorcycle riding, crowd surfing, school spirit, mascot choreography, traditions maintenance
